title: sarothra borealis
intro: Sarothra borealis, also known as the Borneo sarothra, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Sarothra borealis are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, which can help to alleviate symptoms of conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant, including extracts and infusions, can be used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
